author: lOrm
content: Landed native GrepTool at src/tools/file/grep.rs (#568). Args: pattern (required regex), path (default .), context_lines (default 0), case_insensitive (default false). Backed by the regex crate; outputs file:line:match with ±N context emitted as file-line-text. Caps: 200 matches, 5MB/file, 50k walked entries. Skips vendor dirs. Registered as 'grep' in registry, added to KNOWN_SAFE. 5 tests: file:line:match emission, ±1 context, invalid regex error, missing pattern error, case_insensitive flag. NOT parity: ripgrep file-type filters, glob filters, output_mode toggle, head_limit — left for a future expansion under the cc-parity label.
